# The Asian rebalancing: the arc resolves {#sec-ch10}

> *The centre returns east — partially, and within a Western-built order.*

::: {.callout-note}
## Draft pending
**Period:** 1945–2010s. This chapter is a stub. Draft it from the standardized template
(`_chapter-template.qmd`) using its story spine
(`teaching/ecu4413_world_econ/module_design/topic_10_story_spine_2026-06-20.md`), the matching topic brief, the
centre-of-gravity ledger, the data compendium, and `datasets_by_topic.md`.
:::
